title: JOSAT - Editör Mesajı
content:
JOSAT - Editör Mesajı

EDITOR-IN-CHIEF MESSAGE

Dear Journal

Readers,

As the Faculty of Engineering and Architecture, we are proud to publish the first issue of JOSAT. Academic journals make significant contributions to the development of science both in our country and around the world. These contributions are important in the development of the country, in the improvement of the quality of education and in the healthy progress of scientific developments. In particular, developments in the fields of engineering and architecture have an important place in achieving critical goals such as the advancement of technology, artificial intelligence, sustainable cities construction and the integrity of social life. Engineering and architecture are not only disciplines based on technical knowledge and skills, but also fields that need to be acted with a sense of social responsibility. Academic studies in these disciplines; It offers innovative solutions on issues such as strategic sustainability, energy efficiency, urbanization and the design of infrastructure projects. These solutions not only contribute to the development of the country, but also guide technical developments by supporting the overcoming of challenges on a global scale. In this context, the quality of the studies published in a peer-reviewed journal is of great importance. In order for a quality publication to emerge, each stakeholder, from authors to referees, from journal management to editors, must work with great care and responsibility. In order to be successful. in this process, it is essential for academics to have a deep knowledge of scientific research methods, article writing techniques and ethical principles. Scientific ethics is one of the most important elements of this process, and scrupulous adherence to these principles ensures the reliability and validity of scientific publications.

Articles submitted to JOSAT are primarily scanned with a plagiarism program. In this way, a serious control mechanism is established against violations of scientific ethics. In addition, with the "blind refereeing" application, each article is submitted to the review of two referees, and if one of the referees decides "unpublishable", the article

is rejected. However, in case of negative feedback from a referee, the opinion of a third referee is sought. This process is meticulously implemented to ensure the quality and reliability of the publications. Although the publication of the first issue of our journal is an important step in the academic world, it is a process that will take time for quality publications to be recognized at the international level and to be included in the indexes. Contributing to quality journals will only be possible by

proceeding in accordance with these processes. We are waiting for the contributions of you, valuable writers, on this challenging but valuable path.

We

would like to express our gratitude and thanks to the authors from our university and outside our university who contributed to this issue, to everyone who contributed to the publication of the journal, and to our esteemed referees who added value with their meticulous

work

.

In our next issue, we hope to be able to bring together the qualified works of valuable authors with the readers.

Doç.Dr./ Assoc.Prof. Dr.

Hande Sanem ÇINAR- Baş Editör / Editor in chief
